productDisplayName: Nike Women Sami Standard Blue Bag
description: nike presents the perfect handbag for those who love to carry their world with them! With loads of space and great looks, this Steady Standard bag is the arm candy you've been waiting for!  Look like a diva as you carry this blue and black bag to the mall or coffee shop. Be prepared to make heads turn with this stylish fashion accessory!MeasurementHeight: 29 cmWidth: 52 cmDepth: 24 cmCapacity: 23 litresMade of 55% nylon, 35% polyurethane and 10% polyester for enhanced durability and styleNylon lining for increased durabilityWater-resistant tarpaulin bttomOne main roomy zippered compartment with a small fleece-lined zippered pocket to hold essentialsA second smaller zippered compartment for storing itemsHook-loop design above zipper for additional closureshort handles for ease of carrying Cushioned tubular handle cunstruction for added comfortSnap buttons to clip the handles together for added convenienceBranded zippers and sliders for easy useEye-catching graphic print all overnike Swoosh appliqued on the front for branding and added attractionCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
